2604.11004.title: Panoptic Pairwise Distortion Graph
2604.11004.paper_summary: In this work, we introduce a new perspective on comparative image assessment by representing an image pair as a structured composition of its regions. In contrast, existing methods focus on whole image analysis, while implicitly relying on region-level understanding. We extend the intra-image notion of a scene graph to inter-image, and propose a novel task of Distortion Graph (DG). DG treats paired images as a structured topology grounded in regions, and represents dense degradation information such as distortion type, severity, comparison and quality score in a compact interpretable graph structure. To realize the task of learning a distortion graph, we contribute (i) a region-level dataset, PandaSet, (ii) a benchmark suite, PandaBench, with varying region-level difficulty, and (iii) an efficient architecture, Panda, to generate distortion graphs. We demonstrate that PandaBench poses a significant challenge for state-of-the-art multimodal large language models (MLLMs) as they fail to understand region-level degradations even when fed with explicit region cues. We show that training on PandaSet or prompting with DG elicits region-wise distortion understanding, opening a new direction for fine-grained, structured pairwise image assessment.
2604.11004.paper_summary_zh: 在這項工作中，我們通過將一對圖像表示為其區域的結構化組合，介紹了比較圖像評估的新視角。相對而言，現有的方法專注於整體圖像分析，同時隱含地依賴於區域級的理解。我們將場景圖的圖像內部概念擴展到圖像之間，並提出了一個新任務——失真圖（DG）。DG將配對圖像視為基於區域的結構化拓撲，並以緊湊且可解釋的圖形結構表示密集的劣化信息，如失真類型、嚴重程度、比較和質量評分。為了實現學習失真圖的任務，我們貢獻了（i）一個區域級數據集PandaSet，（ii）一個基準套件PandaBench，具有不同的區域級難度，以及（iii）一個高效的架構Panda，用於生成失真圖。我們展示了PandaBench對於最先進的多模態大型語言模型（MLLMs）提出了重大挑戰，因為它們即使在提供明確的區域提示時也無法理解區域級的劣化。我們顯示，在PandaSet上訓練或使用DG進行提示，可以引發區域級的失真理解，為細粒度的結構化成對圖像評估開辟了新方向。
2604.11004.author: Muhammad Kamran Janjua et.al.
2604.11004.authors: Muhammad Kamran Janjua, Abdul Wahab, Bahador Rashidi
